name: pr-source contract validator rejects a missing fetch_frequency field
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'sources:\n  - {id: x, name: x, github: x/y, tier: 1, source_class: financial-industry, applies_to: [node]}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/validate-source-contract.sh" --registry .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'missing.*fetch_frequency' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
